course_description: Bon bai tu vung A1 (British Council LearnEnglish): phu kien, hanh dong, ngoai hinh, phong ngu.

theory_pages.title: Tu vung (Vocabulary)
theory_pages.body:
### Tu vung chu de: Phu kien (Accessories)

Duoi day la danh sach cac tu vung ve phu kien ma ban thuong su dung hang ngay.

| Tu | Ngha |
|---|---|
| **bag** | tui xach |
| **belt** | that lung |
| **bracelet** | vong tay |
| **cap** | mu luoi trai (co vat che mat) |
| **earrings** | bong tai |
| **glasses** | kinh mat |
| **gloves** | gang tay |
| **hat** | mu non |
| **necklace** | day chuyen |
| **pocket** | tui quan/ao |
| **rucksack** | balo |
| **scarf** | khan quang co |

---

#### Vi du trong cau

- A **belt** goes around your waist to hold your trousers up.
- You wear **glasses** to see better.
- A **rucksack** is a bag that you wear on your back.
- A **scarf** goes around your neck to keep you warm.
- **Earrings** are jewellery for your ears.
- A **pocket** is the place in your trousers or shirt where you can put things.
- You wear **gloves** on your hands when it is cold.
- A **cap** protects your head and eyes from the sun.
- A **necklace** is a piece of jewellery for your neck.
- A **bracelet** is a piece of jewellery for your wrist.

quizzes.question_text: This holds your trousers up. It goes around your waist.
quizzes.hint_text: Day la vat dung de giu quan khoi tut xuong, thuong lam bang da hoac vai.

quizzes.question_text: You wear this on your head. It protects your head and eyes from the sun.
quizzes.hint_text: Day la loai mu co vat che phia truoc de chong nang.

quizzes.question_text: You wear these to see better.
quizzes.hint_text: Day la vat dung tro giup thi luc, thuong lam bang kinh va khung kim loai hoac nhua.

quizzes.question_text: You wear this on your back to carry your things.
quizzes.hint_text: Day la loai tui deo sau lung, pho bien voi hoc sinh va nguoi di du lich.

quizzes.question_text: You wear this to keep warm. It goes around your neck.
quizzes.hint_text: Day la vat dung quanh co de giu am, thuong duoc dung vao mua dong.

quizzes.question_text: This is a place in your trousers or shirt. You can put things like your phone and money here.
quizzes.hint_text: Day la mot khoang nho nam tren quan hoac ao, khong phai vat trang suc.

quizzes.question_text: You wear these on your hands when it is cold.
quizzes.hint_text: Day la vat dung bao phu ban tay de chong lanh.

quizzes.question_text: You wear these on your ears as jewellery.
quizzes.hint_text: Day la loai trang suc duoc deo o tai.

quizzes.question_text: Earrings are jewellery for your ___.
quizzes.hint_text: Bong tai la trang suc duoc deo tren bo phan nao cua co the?

quizzes.question_text: A piece of jewellery worn around the neck is called a ___.
quizzes.hint_text: Day chuyen la vat trang suc duoc deo quanh co.

quizzes.question_text: Which of these is NOT a type of jewellery?
quizzes.hint_text: Ba trong so nay la trang suc; mot la do dung mang do.

quizzes.question_text: Things we wear on our head or neck include (select the correct group):
quizzes.hint_text: Nghi den cac phu kien gan vung dau va co.

quizzes.question_text: Which pair correctly describes the accessory?

options.A: gloves - you wear on your feet
options.B: cap - you wear on your head
options.C: belt - you wear around your neck
options.D: rucksack - you carry in your hands

quizzes.hint_text: Mu luoi trai la vat deo tren dau de che nang.

quizzes.question_text: You can wear a ___ around your waist to hold your trousers up.
quizzes.hint_text: That lung duoc deo quanh vung eo de giu quan.

quizzes.question_text: Which accessories are used for carrying things?
quizzes.hint_text: Hai vat nay duoc dung de dung do vat ben trong.

quizzes.question_text: A ___ is a piece of jewellery you wear around your wrist.
quizzes.hint_text: Vong tay la trang suc deo tren co tay.

quizzes.question_text: Glasses help you to ___.
quizzes.hint_text: Kinh mat duoc dung de ho tro thi luc.

theory_pages.title: Tu vung (Vocabulary)
theory_pages.body:
### Tu vung chu de: Hanh dong (Actions)

Duoi day la cac dong tu chi hanh dong thong dung hang ngay.

| Tu | Ngha |
|---|---|
| **listen** | nghe |
| **look** | nhin |
| **speak** | noi |
| **touch** | cham, so |
| **write** | viet |
| **read** | doc |
| **smile** | cuoi |
| **sleep** | ngu |
| **draw** | ve (tranh) |
| **cry** | khoc |
| **type** | ganh may (gõ ban phim) |
| **eat** | an |

---

#### Vi du trong cau

- We **listen** when we want to hear something.
- We **speak** when we use our mouth to talk.
- When we **touch** something, we feel it with our hands.
- We can use a pen to **write** a letter on paper.
- We **draw** a picture.
- When we are tired, we should **sleep**.
- We **smile** when we are happy.
- We **cry** when we feel very sad.
- We **type** on a keyboard or touchscreen.
- We **eat** when we are hungry.

---

#### Phan nhom hanh dong

**Hanh dong lam bang mieng (Actions done with our mouth):**
- smile, speak, eat

**Hanh dong lam bang tay (Actions done with our hands):**
- write, draw, type, touch

quizzes.question_text: We ___ when we want to hear something.
quizzes.hint_text: Hanh dong su dung tai de thu am thanh.

quizzes.question_text: We ___ when we use our mouth to talk.
quizzes.hint_text: Hanh dong su dung mieng de noi chuyen voi ai do.

quizzes.question_text: When we ___ something, we feel it with our hands.
quizzes.hint_text: Hanh dong su dung tay de cam nhan bề mat cua mot vat.

quizzes.question_text: We ___ a picture using a pencil or pen.
quizzes.hint_text: Hanh dong tao ra hinh anh bang but chi hoac but muc.

quizzes.question_text: We ___ when we are happy.
quizzes.hint_text: Khi vui ve, khoe mat cua ban se tao ra bieu cam nay.

quizzes.question_text: We ___ when we feel very sad.
quizzes.hint_text: Khi buon, nuoc mat se chay — day la hanh dong gi?

quizzes.question_text: We ___ on a keyboard or touchscreen.
quizzes.hint_text: Hanh dong go chu tren ban phim hoac man hinh cam ung.

quizzes.question_text: When we are tired, we should ___.
quizzes.hint_text: Khi met moi, co the ban can nghi ngoi va lam hanh dong nay.

quizzes.question_text: We can use a pen to ___ a letter on paper.
quizzes.hint_text: Dung but viet, ban lam hanh dong gi tren giay?

quizzes.question_text: We ___ when we are hungry.
quizzes.hint_text: Khi doi bung, ban can thuc hien hanh dong nay.

quizzes.question_text: Which actions are done with our mouth? (Choose the best group)
quizzes.hint_text: Nghi den cac hanh dong su dung mieng: noi, an, va bieu lo cam xuc tren mat.

quizzes.question_text: Which actions are done with our hands? (Choose the best group)
quizzes.hint_text: Nghi den cac hanh dong su dung ban tay: ghi chep, ve, go may tinh, va cam nhan.

quizzes.question_text: What is the past simple of 'draw'?
quizzes.hint_text: 'Draw' la dong tu bat quy tac — qua khu don cua no khong them '-ed'.

quizzes.question_text: What is the past simple of 'eat'?
quizzes.hint_text: 'Eat' la dong tu bat quy tac — qua khu don cua no la 'ate'.

quizzes.question_text: What is the past simple of 'sleep'?
quizzes.hint_text: 'Sleep' la dong tu bat quy tac — qua khu don cua no la 'slept'.

quizzes.question_text: What is the difference between 'listen' and 'hear'?

options.A: They mean exactly the same thing
options.B: 'Listen' is active (you choose to do it), 'hear' is passive (it happens automatically)

quizzes.hint_text: Nghi den su khac biet giua chu dong va bi dong trong viec thu am thanh.

quizzes.question_text: Which sentence uses an action verb correctly?

options.A: She listens the music very loud.
options.B: He cried because he was happy.
options.C: We read a book every evening.

quizzes.hint_text: Chon cau su dung dong tu hanh dong mot cach tu nhien va chinh xac.

theory_pages.title: Tu vung (Vocabulary)
theory_pages.body:
### Tu vung chu de: Ngoai hinh (Appearance)

Duoi day la cac tu vung mo ta ngoai hinh cua con nguoi.

| Tu | Ngha |
|---|---|
| **afro hairstyle** | kieu toc afro (xoan to, phong) |
| **blond hair** | toc vang |
| **dark hair** | toc den/toc sam |
| **dyed blue hair** | toc nhuom mau xanh |
| **ginger hair** | toc hung (mau do cam) |
| **shaved head** | dau cao troc |
| **old** | gia |
| **short** | lun/ngan |
| **tall** | cao |
| **young** | tre |

---

#### Mo ta ngoai hinh - So sanh

- Sam is 29 and Mary is 31. Mary is **older** than Sam.
- Mei is 165cm tall and Duniya is 170cm tall. Mei is **shorter** than Duniya.
- Kazuo has dark hair and Anton has blonde hair. Kazuo's hair is **darker** than Anton's hair.
- Children are **younger** than their parents.
- There are more people with blonde or dark hair than with **ginger hair**.

---

#### So sanh hon (Comparatives)

| Tu goc | Dang so sanh |
|---|---|
| blonde | blonder |
| dark | darker |
| old | older |
| short | shorter |
| tall | taller |
| young | younger |

quizzes.question_text: Hair that is orange-red in colour is called ___.
quizzes.hint_text: Loai toc nay co mau giong nhu cu gung (ginger), mau cam do.

quizzes.question_text: Hair that is very light yellow in colour is called ___.
quizzes.hint_text: Loai toc nay co mau vang nhat, pho bien o Bac Au.

quizzes.question_text: When someone has no hair at all on their head, we say they have a ___.
quizzes.hint_text: Dau duoc cao toan bo, khong con toc.

quizzes.question_text: Hair that has been coloured with a blue dye is called ___.
quizzes.hint_text: Loai toc nay khong phai mau tu nhien — no duoc nhuom mau.

quizzes.question_text: A hairstyle with tight, round curls that forms a large round shape is called ___.
quizzes.hint_text: Kieu toc nay co xoan tu nhien, phong to thanh hinh tron quanh dau.

quizzes.question_text: Sam is 29 years old and Mary is 31 years old. Mary is ___ than Sam.
quizzes.hint_text: Mary co nhieu tuoi hon Sam, nen dung dang so sanh cua 'old'.

quizzes.question_text: Mei is 165cm and Duniya is 170cm. Mei is ___ than Duniya.
quizzes.hint_text: Mei thap hon Duniya 5cm, nen dung dang so sanh cua 'short'.

quizzes.question_text: Children are ___ than their parents.
quizzes.hint_text: Con cai luon it tuoi hon cha me cua ho.

quizzes.question_text: Which word describes the opposite of 'tall'?
quizzes.hint_text: Tu trai nghia voi 'cao' la gi?

quizzes.question_text: Which word describes the opposite of 'young'?
quizzes.hint_text: Tu trai nghia voi 'tre' la gi?

quizzes.question_text: What is the comparative form of 'tall'?
quizzes.hint_text: Cac tinh tu mot am tiet ngan thuong them '-er' de tao dang so sanh.

quizzes.question_text: What is the comparative form of 'young'?
quizzes.hint_text: Them '-er' vao sau tinh tu de tao dang so sanh.

quizzes.question_text: Kazuo has dark hair and Anton has blonde hair. Kazuo's hair is ___ than Anton's.
quizzes.hint_text: Toc den so voi toc vang — loai nao toi hon?

quizzes.question_text: Which of these describes a natural hair colour?
quizzes.hint_text: Trong cac lua chon, chi mot la mau toc tu nhien, khong qua nhuom mau.

quizzes.question_text: Which sentence correctly uses appearance vocabulary?

options.B: He is very tall with dark hair.

quizzes.hint_text: Chon cau co cau truc ngu phap chinh xac khi mo ta ngoai hinh.

quizzes.question_text: What does 'dyed' mean in 'dyed blue hair'?
quizzes.hint_text: 'Dyed' co nghia la duoc xu ly hoac thay doi mau bang chat nhuom.

theory_pages.title: Tu vung (Vocabulary)
theory_pages.body:
### Tu vung chu de: Phong ngu (Bedrooms)

Duoi day la cac tu vung mo ta do vat va noi that trong phong ngu.

| Tu | Ngha |
|---|---|
| **alarm clock** | dong ho bao thuc |
| **bedside table** | ban dau giuong |
| **blanket** | chan (chien) am |
| **carpet** | tham trai san |
| **chest of drawers** | tu co nhieu ngan keo |
| **double bed** | giuong doi (2 nguoi) |
| **duvet** | chan long vu (chan bong) |
| **lamp** | den ban/den doc sach |
| **pillow** | goi |
| **sheet** | ga trai giuong |
| **single bed** | giuong don (1 nguoi) |
| **wardrobe** | tu quan ao |

---

#### Giai thich

- **Alarm clock**: dung dong ho nay de dat gio bao thuc vao buoi sang.
- **Bedside table**: ban nho dat cạnh giuong — ban co the de den, sach, va nuoc tren do.
- **Blanket**: mieng vai day, am — dung khi troi lanh.
- **Carpet**: tham mem trai tren san nha.
- **Chest of drawers**: tu co nhieu ngan keo — dung de chua quan ao.
- **Double bed**: giuong du cho 2 nguoi ngu.
- **Duvet**: chan bong hoac chan long vu — rat am, dung vao mua dong.
- **Lamp**: nguon sang trong phong, thuong dat tren ban dau giuong.
- **Pillow**: goi mem dat duoi dau khi ngu.
- **Sheet**: lai vai mong trang trai len giuong.
- **Single bed**: giuong du cho 1 nguoi ngu.
- **Wardrobe**: tu lon dung de treo quan ao.

---

#### Luu y ve so nhieu bat quy tac

- alarm clock -> **alarm clocks**
- bedside table -> **bedside tables**
- chest of drawers -> **chests of drawers**
- single bed -> **single beds**

quizzes.question_text: One person sleeps in this.
quizzes.hint_text: Day la loai giuong danh cho mot nguoi ngu.

quizzes.question_text: Two people can sleep in this.
quizzes.hint_text: Day la loai giuong co the chua hai nguoi ngu cung luc.

quizzes.question_text: This thin cloth covers a bed.
quizzes.hint_text: Day la lop vai mong nhat, dat truc tiep len de giuong.

quizzes.question_text: This is on the floor. It is soft.
quizzes.hint_text: Day la vat mem trai tren san nha, khong phai do ngu.

quizzes.question_text: This is a soft bed cover. It has feathers inside.
quizzes.hint_text: Loai chan nay co long vu ben trong, rat am ap.

quizzes.question_text: This is a warm cloth. We use it when it is cold, especially for the bed.
quizzes.hint_text: Day la loai chan vai thuong, khong co long vu, dung de giu am khi lanh.

quizzes.question_text: This is a big cupboard for your clothes.
quizzes.hint_text: Day la do noi that lon trong phong ngu, dung de treo quan ao.

quizzes.question_text: People put their head on this in bed.
quizzes.hint_text: Day la vat mem dat duoi dau khi nam ngu.

quizzes.question_text: You turn this on to see at night.
quizzes.hint_text: Day la vat phat sang, thuong dat tren ban dau giuong.

quizzes.question_text: This makes a noise to wake you up.
quizzes.hint_text: Day la do vat dua ra tieng dong vao gio da dat de danh thuc ban day.

quizzes.question_text: A pillow is usually soft. (True or False?)
quizzes.hint_text: Goi thuong lam bang vat lieu mem de thoai mai khi ngu.

quizzes.question_text: We often use a blanket in hot weather. (True or False?)
quizzes.hint_text: Chan duoc dung khi troi lanh, khong phai khi troi nong.

quizzes.question_text: The plural (so nhieu) of 'alarm clock' is ___.
quizzes.hint_text: Them '-s' vao phan cuoi cua cum danh tu: tu chinh la 'clock'.

quizzes.question_text: The plural (so nhieu) of 'chest of drawers' is ___.
quizzes.hint_text: Trong cum tu nay, ca 'chest' va 'drawers' deu them '-s' khi chuyen sang so nhieu.

quizzes.question_text: Which items go ON a bed?

options.C: alarm clock, chest of drawers, bedside table

quizzes.hint_text: Nghi den cac vat duoc dat truc tiep tren mat giuong khi ban ngu.

quizzes.question_text: The alarm clock tells the time and wakes you up. (True or False?)
quizzes.hint_text: Dong ho bao thuc co hai chuc nang chinh.

quizzes.question_text: You hang your shirts in the chest of drawers. (True or False?)
quizzes.hint_text: Tu co ngan keo dung de gap do, khong phai treo do. Cai nao dung de TREO quan ao?

quizzes.question_text: You usually turn on your lamp in the middle of the day. (True or False?)
quizzes.hint_text: Den ban thuong duoc bat vao ban dem hoac khi can them anh sang, khong phai ban ngay.
